raw_output:
- [P1] Add the required review artifacts for this PR — /workspaces/sleep-optimizer/CLAUDE.md:51-52
  This PR adds no `docs/reviews/pr-<N>/` artifacts, so the required `review-gate` check will fail when it looks for the current PR's four attestation files. Commit the complete, validated artifact set before merging, including for this documentation-only change.

- [P2] Enforce the pinned ship version for existing installations — /workspaces/sleep-optimizer/CLAUDE.md:53-53
  If a machine already has `~/.claude/skills/ship/` checked out at an older or incompatible revision, this condition skips the `v0.2.0` checkout and the agent follows a different merge and escalation protocol than the one adopted here. Keep cloning conditional, but verify or select the pinned tag whenever the directory already exists as well.


--- Post-review delta ---
Fix round applied after review: SHA-pin + verify-existing-install line, faithful escalation paraphrase (bug-fix carve-out + full data item), bypass wording (policy vs enforcement). Attested hash covers the fixed text; delta verified same-section.

findings.summary: PR lacks its own review artifacts — gate fails until committed
findings.reason: The authoring-order condition; fixed by this commit (hash-exempt path).

findings.summary: Self-install line skips version verification when the skill directory already exists
findings.reason: Install line now verifies HEAD == pinned SHA at session start and re-checkouts on any mismatch.
